title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - DevOps
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 10 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 96%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 100%, and average score is 7.89/10. Total training hours are 216 and scaled cost is 15. Overall effectiveness classification is Effective. Management interpretation: The training program for the DevOps course has demonstrated high effectiveness, achieving a completion rate of 100% and a pass rate of 100% among the 10 trainees. The overall attendance rate is commendable at 96%, and the average score of 7.89 out of 10 indicates strong performance. The feedback rating of 4.6 out of 5 further supports the positive reception of the course content and delivery.
insights: DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring has an effectiveness score of 92.28 in the selected scope.
The course has successfully met all key performance indicators, with no outstanding issues or flags raised during the evaluation process.
The total training hours amount to 216, with a scaled cost of 15, resulting in a favorable ROI proxy of 0.0207.
The effectiveness score of 92.28 reflects the course's alignment with organizational learning objectives.
recommendations: Maintain the current delivery model and reuse top-performing materials for future cohorts.

To maintain and enhance the effectiveness of future training initiatives, it is recommended to continue leveraging the successful elements of this course while exploring opportunities for advanced topics or follow-up sessions in DevOps.
Additionally, consider implementing a mentorship program for high-performing trainees to foster knowledge sharing and leadership development.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
